summary.profiling: demo runtime now tracks endpoint calls, cache hits and latency metrics through a dedicated runtime profile registry
summary.caching: read-heavy API surfaces use bounded TTL caching with deterministic invalidation after mutating operations
summary.dataAccess: in-memory repositories were indexed by user and id to avoid repeated full scans on high-frequency list endpoints
summary.reliability: new backend tests validate cache hit accounting and cache invalidation after write operations
